

Neg Binoma, $E(y) = \mu$, $\theta$ is size, $1/\sqrt(\theta)$ is sd of Gamma random effect

$$
\begin{aligned}
f(y;\mu,\theta) =  & \log\Gamma(y + r) - \log\Gamma(r) - \log\Gamma(y + 1) 
	+ r \log(\frac{r}{r + \mu})
	+ y \log(\frac{\mu}{r + \mu}) \\
	= &  \log\Gamma(y + r) - \log\Gamma(r) - \log\Gamma(y + 1)  + r \log r - r \log(r + \mu) + y \log(\mu) - y\log(r + \mu)
\end{aligned}
$$

# to do

- outer wrappers in adlaplace
- inner_opt produces LinvPt
- ... and whichColumnsByGroup and 
- outer adpack argument, compute trace
- ... and full hessian, gradient 
- all with same omp threads, 


```{r theData}
Nobs = 10000;Nrandom1=70;Nrandom2=50

set.seed(0)
X = Matrix::Matrix(cbind(1, rbinom(Nobs,1, prob= 0.5)))
AmatList = list(
	Matrix::sparseMatrix(
		i = 1:Nobs,
		j= sample(Nrandom1, Nobs, replace=TRUE)
	),
	Matrix::sparseMatrix(
		i = 1:Nobs,
		j= sample(Nrandom2, Nobs, replace=TRUE)
	)
)
Amat = do.call(cbind, AmatList)
beta = rep(1, ncol(X))
thetaOrig = c(0.1, 0.1, 0.1);theta = log(thetaOrig)
gamma = rnorm(ncol(Amat), sd=rep(thetaOrig[1:2], c(Nrandom1, Nrandom2)))
eta = as.vector(X %*% beta + Amat %*% gamma)
etaT = exp(eta)
Z = rgamma(length(etaT), 0.1^(-2), 0.1^(-2))
c(mean(Z), sd(Z))
y = rpois(length(etaT), etaT*Z)

NperEffect = unlist(lapply(AmatList, ncol))   
map = rep(seq(0, len=length(NperEffect)), NperEffect)

data = list(y = y, 
	ATp = as(Matrix::t(Amat), 'dMatrix'),
	XTp = as(Matrix::t(X), 'CsparseMatrix'),
	map = map, 
	Qdiag = rep(1, ncol(Amat)))


config = list(beta = rep(1, nrow(data$XTp)), 
	theta = c(rep(-1, length(NperEffect)), -1), 
	transform_theta=TRUE, start_gamma = rep(0, nrow(data$ATp)),
	groups = adlaplace::adFun_groups(100, data$ATp),
	num_threads=parallel::detectCores(),
	verbose=FALSE)	

sparsity_raw = adlaplace::sparsity(data, config)
sparsity_list = adlaplace::group_sparsity(data=data, config=config, sparsity_raw)

config = modifyList(config, sparsity_list)
```




```{r loglik}
ll1 = adlaplace::logLik(
	x=c(config$beta, config$theta),
	data, config,
	deriv=TRUE)
ll1$deriv	
```

```{r outerOpt}
cache = new.env()
assign('start_gamma', config$start_gamma, cache)

adFunFull = adlaplace::getAdFun(data, modifyList(config, list(verbose=TRUE)), inner=FALSE)

mle = trustOptim::trust.optim(
	c(config$beta, config$theta),
	adlaplace::outer_fn, adlaplace::outer_gr,
	method='SR1',
	data=data, config=config, cache=cache, adPack = adFunFull,
	control_inner = list(),
	control = list(report.level=4, report.freq=1)
	)
```


```{r checkDerivatives}
# get adFun again, with sparsity
data2 = data#modifyList(data, list(groups = data$groups[,1:200,drop=FALSE]))
config2 = config[grep("group|hessian", names(config), invert=TRUE)]
config2$start_gamma = res2$solution
sparsity_list = adlaplace::group_sparsity(
	data= data2,
	config=config2)
config = modifyList(config2, sparsity_list)
config$num_threads = 1
adFunInner = adlaplace::getAdFun(data2, config, inner=TRUE)
adFun = adlaplace::getAdFun(data2, config, inner=FALSE)

adlaplace::jointLogDens(config$start_gamma, adFunInner, config)
adlaplace::jointLogDens(c(config$beta, config$start_gamma, config$theta), adFun, config)

Sgamma = seq(length(config$beta)+1, len=length(config$start_gamma))
gInner = adlaplace::grad(config$start_gamma, adFunInner, config)
g = adlaplace::grad(c(config$beta, config$start_gamma, config$theta), adFun, config)
gNum = numDeriv::grad(adlaplace::jointLogDens, config$start_gamma, adPack = adFunInner, config=config)

matplot(gNum, cbind(gInner,g[Sgamma]), col=c('red','blue'), cex=c(1, 0.4), pch=15)
abline(0,1)

hesOuter = adlaplace::hessian(c(config$beta, config$start_gamma, config$theta), adFun, config)
hesInner = adlaplace::hessian(config$start_gamma, adFunInner, config)
hesN = numDeriv::jacobian(adlaplace::grad, x=config$start_gamma, adPack=adFunInner, config=config)

matplot(cbind(
	apply(abs(hesInner-hesN), 2, sum),
	apply(abs(hesOuter[Sgamma,Sgamma]-hesN), 2, sum)))



which(unlist(lapply(sparsity_list$group_outer, function(xx) any(xx$match == 9))))
which(unlist(lapply(sparsity_list$group_inner, function(xx) any(xx$match == 2))))

sparsity_list$group_inner[[5]][c('i','j','match')]
bob = as(sparsity_list$hessian_inner, 'TsparseMatrix');rbind(bob@i, bob@j)

sparsity_list$group_outer[[5]][c('i','j','match')]
bob = as(sparsity_list$hessian_outer, 'TsparseMatrix');rbind(bob@i, bob@j)[,1:13]

forNumDeriv = function(xx, ...) {
	adlaplace::jointLogDens(c(xx, config$start_gamma[-(1:length(xx))]), ...)
}
x2 = numDeriv::grad(forNumDeriv, config$start_gamma[1:20], adPack = adFun, config=config)
plot(x2, x[1:length(x2)])
```




```{r llPlain}
llPlain = function(x, data, config) {
	Nbeta = length(config$beta)
	Ngamma = length(config$start_gamma)
	Ntheta = length(config$theta)

	Sobs = data$groups@i+1

	beta = x[1:Nbeta]
	gamma = x[seq(Nbeta+1, len=Ngamma)]
	theta = x[seq(Nbeta + Ngamma+1, len=Ntheta)]
	if(config$transform_theta) {
		theta = exp(theta)
	}



	eta = as.vector(X[Sobs,] %*% beta + Amat[Sobs,] %*% gamma)
	yHere = data$y[Sobs]

	mu = exp(eta)
	dataPart = sum(dnbinom(
		yHere,
		mu = mu,
		size = theta[length(theta)]^(-2),
		log=TRUE
		))

		r = theta[length(theta)]^(-2)
		loglik_vec1a <-  - r * log(r + mu) + yHere * (log(mu) - log(r + mu))
		loglik_vec1dd <-  - log(r + mu) * (r + yHere) 
		loglik_vec1ee <- yHere * log(mu)
		loglik_vec1b <-  loglik_vec1dd + loglik_vec1ee
		if(any(abs(loglik_vec1a - loglik_vec1b)>1e-6)) {
			cat("stuff")
		}

		loglik_vec2 = lgamma(yHere + r) 
		loglik_vec3 =  - lgamma(yHere + 1) - lgamma(r) + r * log(r)

		thetaMap = theta[data$map +1L]
		gamma_scaled = gamma / thetaMap
		qpart = 0.5 * sum(gamma_scaled^2 * data$Qdiag)
		qpartDet = sum(log(thetaMap))

		c(random = qpart, 
			randomDet = qpartDet,
		 	obs=-sum(loglik_vec1b) ,
		 	extra=  - sum(loglik_vec2) - sum(loglik_vec3), 
			dd=sum(loglik_vec1dd), ee=sum(loglik_vec1ee), 
			R = -dataPart,
			minusLogLik = -dataPart + qpart + qpartDet)
	}
```


```{r checkGrad}
Npar=13;Dpar = 3
x = c(config$beta, config$theta)
x = c(beta, theta)
parDf = data.frame(x)[,rep(1, Npar)]
Sx = seq(-1.5, 1.5, len=13) + parDf[Dpar,1]
SxD = Sx[-1] - diff(Sx)/2
parDf[Dpar,] = Sx

adFun = adlaplace::getAdFun(data, modifyList(config, 
	list(verbose=TRUE, num_threads = 1)), inner=FALSE)

dens1 = mapply(
  adlaplace::logLik,
  x = as.list(parDf),
  MoreArgs = list(data=data, config=config, deriv=TRUE, adPack = adFun),
  SIMPLIFY=FALSE
  )

deriv1 = do.call(abind::abind, c(lapply(dens1, '[[', "deriv"), list(along=3)))
sL = unlist(lapply(dens1, function(xx) xx$inner$minusLogLik))

plot(Sx, deriv1[Dpar,'dL', ])
lines(SxD, diff(sL)/diff(Sx))





sDet = unlist(lapply(dens1, function(xx) xx$inner$halfLogDet))
plot(Sx, sDet)
plot(Sx, deriv1[Dpar,'dDet', ])
lines(SxD, diff(sDet)/diff(Sx))


adFun = adlaplace::getAdFun(data, modifyList(config, 
	list(verbose=TRUE, num_threads = 1)), inner=FALSE)


ll1 = adlaplace::logLik(
	x=c(beta, theta),
	data, config,
	adPack = adFun,
	deriv=FALSE)


x = c(beta, ll1$solution, theta)
Npar=13;Dpar = length(x)
parDf = data.frame(x)[,rep(1, Npar)]
Sx = seq(-1.5, 1.5, len=13) + parDf[Dpar,1]
SxD = Sx[-1] - diff(Sx)/2
parDf[Dpar,] = Sx

 dens1 = mapply(
  adlaplace::jointLogDens,
  parameters = as.list(parDf),
  MoreArgs = list(data=data, config=config),
  SIMPLIFY=TRUE
  )


 dens3 = mapply(
  adlaplace::jointLogDensOpt,
  parameters = as.list(parDf),
  MoreArgs = list(adPack = adFun, config=config),
  SIMPLIFY=TRUE
  )

dens2a = mapply(
  llPlain,
  x = as.list(parDf),
  MoreArgs = list(data = data, config=config),
  SIMPLIFY=TRUE
  )

dens2 = apply(dens2a, 2,'[', "minusLogLik")
matplot(Sx, cbind(dens1,dens2, dens3))


adFun2 = adlaplace::getAdFun(
	 data=modifyList(data, list(groups = data$groups[,1,drop=FALSE])), 
	config=modifyList(config, list(verbose=TRUE, num_threads = 1
			)), 
	inner=FALSE)

adlaplace::jointLogDensOpt(
	parDf[,9], adPack = adFun2, 
		config=modifyList(config, 
		list(verbose=TRUE, num_threads = 1))
	)

  adlaplace::jointLogDens(
  	parDf[,9], 
  	data=modifyList(data, list(groups = data$groups[,1,drop=FALSE])), 
	config=modifyList(config, 
		list(verbose=TRUE, num_threads = 1)))

(bob =   llPlain(x=parDf[,9],
	data=modifyList(data, list(groups = data$groups[,1,drop=FALSE])), 
	config=config))
sum(bob[1:4])



quantile(dens1 - dens3)
llPlain(x, data, config)

grad1 = mapply(
  adlaplace::grad,
  parameters = as.list(parDf),
  MoreArgs = list(adPack = adFun, config=config),
  SIMPLIFY=TRUE
  )
hes1 = mapply(
  adlaplace::hessian,
  parameters = as.list(parDf),
  MoreArgs = list(adPack = adFun, config=config),
  SIMPLIFY=FALSE
  )

plot(Sx, grad1[Dpar,])
lines(SxD, diff(dens1)/diff(Sx))

plot(Sx, lapply(hes1, function(xx) xx[Dpar, Dpar]))
lines(SxD, diff(grad1[Dpar,])/diff(Sx))

````
